questions.question: What is the person cooking in the black skillet?
questions.answer_key: An omelet with red peppers or tomatoes
questions.rationale: Main action in high-need window; blind listener needs to know what dish is being prepared

questions.question: What cooking utensil is the person using to manipulate the omelet?
questions.rationale: Key action detail in opening seconds; essential for understanding cooking technique

questions.question: What type of cooking surface or appliance is visible in the background?
questions.answer_key: A white electric stove or cooktop
questions.rationale: Establishes kitchen setting and cooking context for blind listener

questions.question: What liquid ingredient is the person pouring into the second skillet?
questions.answer_key: Oil or cooking liquid from a bottle
questions.rationale: Visible action in high-need window; shows preparation step blind listener cannot see

questions.question: How many black skillets are on the stovetop during this cooking sequence?
questions.rationale: Helps blind listener understand the spatial setup and parallel cooking tasks
